creator: dnelson@allantgroup.com
text:
I'm no longer an active sox user, but the updated version looks like it builds ok, 

Maybe add a comment next to the DISTNAME line saying "downloaded from https://sourceforge.net/p/sox/code/" to show that's it's from the official repo.  It doesn't look like Sourceforge supports downloading arbitrary git hashes in tar/zip format without using a browser, which is why everyone seems to just stash a copy of the zipfile somewhere instead.
